versions.version_description: This one is Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb tuning with Am, Em, and C as main chords. These chords make it easier for beginner guitarists to play. The key has been switched over from C#m to G. If you try to play over the studio recording of the song it most likely will not work due to the change in key.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch]

 
[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]E[/ch]
Black leather gloves, no sequins (Yeah)[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]B[/ch]
Buckles on the jacket, it's Alyx shit[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#[/ch]
Nike crossbody, got a piece in it[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]G#m[/ch]
Got a dance, but it's really on some street shit[/tab]
 
I'ma show you how to get it
 
 
[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]
It go right foot up, left foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Left foot up, right foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Basically, I'm sayin', either way, we 'bout to slide, ayy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Can't let this one slide, ayy[/tab]
 
 
[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]
Don't you wanna dance with me?[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]B[/ch]
No? I can dance like Michael Jackson (Jackson)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#[/ch]
I can give you thug passion (Passion)[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G#m[/ch]
It's a Thriller in the trap where we from[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]E[/ch]
Baby, don't you wanna dance with me?[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]B[/ch]
No? I can dance like Michael Jackson[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F#[/ch]
I can give you satisfaction[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G#m[/ch]
And you know we out here everyday with it[/tab]
 
I'ma show you how to get it
 
 
[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]
It go right foot up, left foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Left foot up, right foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Basically, I'm sayin', either way, we 'bout to slide, ayy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Can't let this one slide, ayy (Who's babe?)[/tab]
 
 
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                               [ch]B[/ch]
    Two thousand shorties wanna tie the knot, ayy, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]F#[/ch]
Two hundred shooters on my brother's block, woah, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G#m[/ch]
Petal off the rose like I love her not, maybe not[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]E[/ch]
I don't know what's wrong with me, I can't stop, woah, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]B[/ch]
Won't stop, woah, yeah, never stop[/tab]
[tab]                                          [ch]F#[/ch]
Got so many opps, I be mistakin' opps for other opps[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]G#m[/ch]
Got so many people that I love out of troubled spots[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]E[/ch]
Other than the family I got, it's either you or me[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]B[/ch]
That's just how I think, it's either you or me[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#[/ch]
This life got too deep for you, baby[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G#m[/ch]
Two or three of us about to creep where they stayin'[/tab]
 
 
[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]E[/ch]
Black leather gloves, no sequins (Yeah)[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]B[/ch]
Buckles on the jacket, it's Alyx shit[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#[/ch]
Nike crossbody, got a piece in it[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]G#m[/ch]
Got a dance, but it's really on some street shit[/tab]
 
I'ma show you how to get it
 
 
[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]
It go right foot up, left foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Left foot up, right foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Basically, I'm sayin' either way, we 'bout to slide, ayy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Can't let this one slide, ayy (Who's bad?)[/tab]
 
 
[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                               [ch]B[/ch]
    Toosie slide, then I hit it double-time[/tab]
[tab]                                               [ch]F#[/ch]
Then I hit a spin 'cause we spun their block a couple times[/tab]
[tab]                                               [ch]G#m[/ch]
If it's not the right time, there'll always be another time[/tab]
[tab]                                                 [ch]E[/ch]
I'm not even trippin', we'll just see 'em in the summertime, woah, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]B[/ch]
Can't describe the pressure I be puttin' on myself, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]F#[/ch]
Really, I just can't afford to lose nobody else, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]G#m[/ch]
If they movin' shaky, we'll just do this shit ourselves, woah[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]E[/ch]
If I'm movin' shaky, Chubbs'll do this shit himself, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]B[/ch]
Solo niggas, only YOLO, for real[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]F#[/ch]
Hear a lot about ya but we don't know, for real[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G#m[/ch]
Next time guarantee the truth'll get revealed[/tab]
 
 
[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]E[/ch]
Black leather gloves, no sequins (Yeah)[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]B[/ch]
Buckles on the jacket, it's Alyx shit[/tab]

Left foot up, right foot, slide[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Basically, I'm sayin', either way, we 'bout to slide, ayy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Can't let this one slide, ayy[/tab]

[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]
Don't you wanna dance with me?[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]B[/ch]
No? I can dance like Michael Jackson (Jackson)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#[/ch]
I can give you the passion (Passion)[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]
